headline: Is Palantir Technologies a Buy After Its Explosive Q1 2026 Earnings?
summary: PLTR's explosive Q1 shows surging revenue, margins, and AI demand, but capacity limits and rising competition complicate the bullish case.

headline: Trane Technologies to Present at the Bank of America Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference
summary: SWORDS, Ireland, May 05, 2026--Trane Technologies plc (NYSE: TT) a global climate innovator, today announced that company leadership will participate in a fireside chat at the Bank of America Industrials, Transportation & Airlines Key Leaders Conference. They will speak at 11:05 a.m. ET on Wednesday, May 13, 2026.

headline: Trane Technologies to Present at the Wolfe Research Global Transportation & Industrials Conference
